dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Canopy
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MARKETING_VERSION)
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
public.app-category.developer-tools
A program running within Canopy would like to use AppleScript.
A program running within Canopy would like to use Bluetooth.
A program running within Canopy would like to access your Calendar.
A program running within Canopy would like to use the camera.
A program running within Canopy would like to access your Contacts.
A program running within Canopy would like to access the local network.
A program running within Canopy would like to access your location information.
A program running within Canopy would like to use your microphone.
A program running within Canopy would like to access motion data.
A program running within Canopy would like to access your Photo Library.
A program running within Canopy would like to access your reminders.
A program running within Canopy would like to use speech recognition.
A program running within Canopy requires elevated privileges.
https://saqoosha.github.io/Canopy/appcast.xml
